name_cn:
ꫛꫀꪝ
Fold Shopper is really amazing~
Latest runway shopping bag/mom bag
Shape: The silhouette is super great, natural and lazy yet unique
Paper grain cowhide: Lightweight and comfortable to wear, folds flat at the bottom, travel essential
Long/Short shoulder strap: Flexible switching, looks great as a shoulder bag or handbag, suitable for daily commute, short trips, business trips
Works as a mom bag too, very stylish and practical! Go for it!
size:50*20*31cm
